text:
Completed task #1: Implement LLM providers + FallbackRouter

## Changes Made
- `company_simulator/llm/providers.py` (new): OpenAIProvider, GeminiProvider, OllamaProvider — all implement LLMClient protocol with `chat()` and `chat_json()` (using json_repair for resilient parsing + retry logic)
- `company_simulator/llm/router.py` (new): FallbackRouter (tries providers in order, falls through on ProviderExhausted) + `create_llm_client()` factory that reads settings.llm_providers
- `company_simulator/llm/__init__.py` (updated): exports all 7 public symbols

## Verification
- `uv run python -c "from company_simulator.llm.router import create_llm_client, FallbackRouter; print('OK')"` -> OK
- Runtime assertions: FallbackRouter instantiates correctly, defaults to OllamaProvider when no API keys set
Task #1 is done. No more tasks assigned to me — standing by for new work.

Completed task #2: Implement AI agents (CEO, CSO, Planner, Reviewer).

## Changes Made
- `company_simulator/agents/ceo.py`: CEO agent with `define_dev_goal()` - builds prompt with context + brainstorm summary, uses `llm.chat_json()` -> `DevGoal`, output values in Korean
- `company_simulator/agents/cso.py`: CSO agent with `provide_opinion()` - analyzes strategic implications -> `CSOOpinion`
- `company_simulator/agents/planner.py`: Planner agent with `create_plan()` - breaks `DevGoal` into `Plan` with task dependencies
- `company_simulator/agents/reviewer.py`: Reviewer agent with `review_task()` - reviews execution results -> `ExecutionReview` with verdict (success/retry/escalate)
- `company_simulator/agents/chat.py`: Chat personas with `chat_as()` - distinct persona prompts for CEO/CSO/PLANNER/REVIEWER, returns plain text
- `company_simulator/agents/context.py`: Context builder with `build_ceo_context()` - combines previous results + brainstorm summary + project description
- `company_simulator/agents/__init__.py`: Updated with all exports

## Verification
- All 6 module imports: OK
- All __init__.py re-exports: OK

Standing by for next assignment.
